notes: The AT2020 is a cardioid condenser side-address microphone with a single 3-pin XLRM output. It requires 48V DC phantom power (2 mA typical) supplied through the XLR cable by a mixer, preamp, or standalone phantom power supply — there is no separate power connector on the device. No rack-mount form factor; desktop/stand-mounted mic. The AT2020USB+ is a distinct USB variant with a different connector and should not be confused with the standard AT2020.

ports.name: Output
ports.note: 3-pin XLRM balanced output; 48V phantom power is received over this same cable — there is no separate power inlet
